prompt: A single isometric ground tile in pixel-art style, matching the colors and shading of the provided reference grass tile. IMPORTANT: use a classic 2:1 isometric angle — the diamond-shaped grass top face must be exactly twice as wide as it is tall (a flat, shallow, low-camera-angle look), NOT a tall steep diamond. Green grass on the top diamond surface with a short band of brown dirt/earth on the front-lower sides beneath the grass, like a thin terrain block. Centered single tile, transparent background, no drop shadow, crisp pixel edges, limited color palette.
